name: clawsig-protocol-v0.2
description: Clawsig Protocol v0.2 roadmap. All CPL-V2-001..005 stories are shipped on main, with causal hardening shipped through CAV-US-024.

userStories.title: Protocol-level rate limiting semantics
userStories.description: Define how proof bundles express and verify rate limits — per-agent, per-model, per-tool. Allows verifiers to detect burst abuse without online state.
acceptanceCriteria: Rate limit claims in proof bundle metadata
Verifier checks claim consistency across bundles from same agent
Conformance vectors for rate limit violations
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #285 (merge 1b21d0cdb562e02347304451cc6edd137a5b99d2): proof_bundle rate_limit_claims schema, deterministic proof/aggregate verifier checks, reason-code wiring, and executable conformance vectors.

userStories.title: Multi-party receipt co-signing
userStories.description: Allow receipts to carry multiple signatures — agent + proxy + human approver. Enables multi-party attestation without central trust.
acceptanceCriteria: Co-signature schema extension (additive, backward compatible)
Verifier validates all co-signatures
Threshold semantics (e.g., 2-of-3 required)
userStories.notes: Shipped via R48 verifier + conformance lanes. Refs: PR #281 (merge a936c099814802df68e810d974d03017f39fd497), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Receipt expiry / TTL semantics
userStories.description: Define how proof bundles and individual receipts express validity windows. Verifiers reject expired receipts.
acceptanceCriteria: TTL field in receipt envelope schema (optional)
Verifier enforces TTL when present
Grace period semantics for clock skew
userStories.notes: Shipped via R49 temporal guardrails and verifier/runtime uptake. Refs: PR #282 (merge 4199b2b80ea5e1993e9063b8408dd81b90757e74), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Selective disclosure for tool receipt arguments
userStories.description: Allow tool receipts to optionally reveal specific argument fields while keeping others hashed. Uses structured commitment schemes.
acceptanceCriteria: Selective disclosure schema (per-field reveal/hash)
Verifier validates partial disclosure against digest
Privacy-preserving: default remains hash-only
userStories.notes: Shipped via selective-disclosure schema/runtime + executable fixtures. Refs: PR #281 (merge a936c099814802df68e810d974d03017f39fd497), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Aggregate proof bundles (bundle-of-bundles)
userStories.description: Define a composition format for fleet-level verification — a single signed envelope containing multiple proof bundles from different agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate bundle schema with member bundle references
Verifier validates aggregate signature + each member
Fleet summary statistics in aggregate metadata
userStories.notes: Shipped via aggregate verifier/runtime + executable aggregate vectors. Refs: PR #282 (merge 4199b2b80ea5e1993e9063b8408dd81b90757e74), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Additive causal binding schema contract
userStories.description: Add optional causal linkage fields to receipt binding schema with legacy-compatible behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional span_id/parent_span_id/tool_span_id/phase/attribution_confidence fields to receipt_binding.v1 schema
No breaking changes for legacy bundles (fields remain optional)
Schema/runtime sync checks remain green
userStories.notes: Shipped via CAV-US-001/002 vertical-slice lane: additive receipt_binding causal fields accepted with legacy-safe optional semantics; verifier/runtime schema sync + conformance checks updated. Refs: decision freeze PR #304 (merge 84ce196cc8e8bcbb126503e681f453bc758b5edb) + CAV-US-001/002 implementation lane.

userStories.title: Fail-closed causal DAG verifier checks
userStories.description: Enforce deterministic causal linkage integrity when causal fields are present.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject dangling parent/tool span references with deterministic reason code
Reject cyclic parent-span graphs with deterministic reason code
Reject out-of-range attribution confidence values while preserving legacy bundle validity when fields are absent
userStories.notes: Shipped via D2 vertical slice: fail-closed causal checks for dangling references, parent-span cycles, and attribution confidence bounds with deterministic reason codes + firewall conformance vectors.

userStories.title: Runtime tool-span emission wiring
userStories.description: Emit deterministic span linkage fields from runtime wrappers without post-sign payload mutation.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime emits causal span fields in receipt bindings
Signature sequencing remains deterministic (stitch before sign, no post-sign mutation)
Concurrent tool windows produce deterministic attribution fallback markers
userStories.notes: Shipped via runtime wiring lane on feat/clawsig-sdk/CAV-US-003-runtime-causal-emission: deterministic span linkage fields are now emitted in SDK/runtime receipt bindings (tool/side-effect/human-approval + Causal Sieve outputs), wrap signature sequencing is resealed after all payload mutation, and concurrent tool windows emit deterministic inferred attribution markers (0.5 confidence + deterministic fallback tool span).

userStories.title: Coverage/label delivery and confidence rendering
userStories.description: Expose causal confidence and degraded coverage posture in buyer-facing evidence and UI contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Tracer/evidence outputs include deterministic confidence provenance markers
Coverage-degraded posture is rendered explicitly in delivery artifacts
No weakening of verifier fail-closed semantics
userStories.notes: Shipped via CLDD enforcement lane: deterministic CLDD metric extraction/comparison, explicit risk flags, and enforce-mode fail-closed reason code (`COVERAGE_CLDD_DISCREPANCY_ENFORCED`) were added without weakening legacy causal/coverage behavior.

userStories.title: Causal confidence tracer delivery surface
userStories.description: Extend artifact tracer outputs with deterministic confidence histogram, low-confidence side-effect listing, and CLDD discrepancy reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Tracer output includes confidence distribution and hash-first low-confidence side-effect list
Tracer includes CLDD discrepancy claimed-vs-attested section
Tracer separates enforcement findings from informational findings
userStories.notes: Shipped via `scripts/poh/trace-artifacts.mjs` + regression tests, adding causal confidence rendering and CLDD delivery diagnostics for ops evidence packs.

userStories.title: Causal/CLDD conformance CI guardrails
userStories.description: Add dedicated fixture pack and CI gate to keep causal + CLDD contracts regression-proof.
acceptanceCriteria: Dedicated causal/CLDD fixture manifest with valid and adversarial vectors
One-command runner for causal/CLDD conformance
Required CI workflow executes the causal/CLDD conformance runner
userStories.notes: Shipped via `clawverify-causal-cldd` fixture pack, protocol runner, env-selectable fixture suite wiring, and dedicated GitHub Actions gate.

userStories.title: Causal binding normalization hardening
userStories.description: Harden binding normalization across snake_case/camelCase aliases and malformed identifier edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject conflicting snake_case vs camelCase causal binding field values
Reject malformed/empty normalized span identifiers
Conformance fixtures cover canonical + adversarial normalization cases
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #310 (merge 7344fca0d8d2b8a2b5ce602e444a4caebc47a0b9): deterministic normalization hardening + fixture coverage.

userStories.title: Causal confidence overclaim enforcement
userStories.description: Fail-close when attribution confidence exceeds deterministic evidence class bounds.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject overclaimed attribution_confidence against emitted causal evidence class
Preserve deterministic confidence bounds for authoritative/inferred/unattributed classes
Conformance fixtures exercise overclaim fail path
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #311 (merge 8071fa99ee3c509cc6de16eeaa0057ec6c684360): confidence class policy checks + reason-code enforcement.

userStories.title: Causal replay + span-reuse guardrails
userStories.description: Detect receipt replay and semantic span reuse drift within proof bundles.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject same receipt_id with divergent canonicalized content
Reject same span_id reused with semantic parent/tool/phase/confidence drift
Guardrail fixtures + CI lane prevent regressions
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #312 (merge b4fafa2a8646f6bb4fd6d55b2a2820e17f7f1f69): replay/span-reuse fail-closed checks and guardrails.

userStories.title: Reason-code parity + explain coverage closure
userStories.description: Close drift between verifier reason codes, CLI hints, and protocol registry.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated parity check fails when verifier codes are missing from registry/hints
CLI explain coverage includes causal hardening codes
CI required check enforces parity contract
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #313 (merge 2ac4ccd3135dc24c135670022f6407eb2fa605f5): reason-code parity automation + hint coverage closure.

userStories.title: Causal connectivity + orphan enforcement
userStories.description: Enforce connected causal lineage and orphan receipt anchoring semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject disconnected causal graphs in enforce mode
Reject unanchored side-effect and human-approval receipts in enforce mode
Dedicated connectivity conformance fixtures + CI gate
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #314 (merge 6b54353230889d5fd8e10b75ec3532ce76f4f182): connectivity/orphan fail-closed enforcement with conformance gating.

userStories.title: Causal mutation-evasion guardrails
userStories.description: Add deterministic mutation-lane guardrails to catch causal evasion regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Mutation guardrail runner emits deterministic summary artifacts
Quick + scheduled full mutation lanes in CI
Guardrail checks fail-closed on missing seed fixtures or reason-code drift
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #315 (merge dae42d871a28d0f7dba95f643067bb0b5096e44e): mutation guardrail runner + CI schedule + artifact contract.

userStories.title: Causal clock monotonicity + phase transition automaton
userStories.description: Enforce causal timestamp monotonicity and deterministic phase transition invariants.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject parent/tool causal ordering contradictions
Reject invalid deterministic phase transitions
Dedicated causal-clock conformance fixtures + CI workflow
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #316 (merge d708c4bdef061b6c4ebeaef342323ce4238a91e2): causal clock and phase automaton enforcement + conformance lane.

userStories.title: Aggregate causal consistency
userStories.description: Enforce cross-member causal semantic consistency and receipt replay invariants in aggregate bundles.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject cross-member span semantic conflicts for shared run namespace/span lineage
Reject cross-member receipt replay divergence
Dedicated aggregate-causal conformance fixtures + CI lane
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #317 (merge b1b0e9894b602c2e45c21b5d22228fa237ce083f): aggregate causal consistency fail-closed checks and executable conformance.

userStories.title: Causal integrity burn-in meta gate
userStories.description: Compose all causal guardrails into a deterministic burn-in gate with summary artifacts and CI automation.
acceptanceCriteria: Burn-in runner executes required causal conformance + mutation guardrail steps
Runner emits deterministic summary artifact under artifacts/ops/causal-integrity-burnin
PR/push + nightly CI lanes gate causal integrity burn-in
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #318 (merge adfec1f3ad90ef3e18fba4d970975f1dd6a0afeb): burn-in meta-runner + CI jobs + artifact contract.

userStories.title: Policy-profile lock (anti-downgrade)
userStories.description: Prevent silent weakening of causal enforcement by introducing explicit policy profiles with strict anti-downgrade behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Verifier supports explicit causal policy profiles: compat and strict
Strict profile rejects weaker causal override modes with deterministic reason codes
Resolved policy snapshot is emitted in verifier output metadata for auditability
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #319 (merge 7a3bfc8201e2a73c3c9298f894bd7dc679e46e75): strict profile lock, anti-downgrade enforcement, and profile-conformance lane.

userStories.title: Cross-runtime causal determinism gate
userStories.description: Guarantee deterministic causal verdict parity across Node and Bun runtimes.
acceptanceCriteria: Cross-runtime runner executes causal conformance suites under Node and Bun
Fixture-level status + reason-code parity is compared deterministically
CI fails on any runtime divergence and emits cross-runtime summary artifact
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #320 (merge d2dc1bcd09f40292077e47892d57ed9f0b17ed3c): runtime parity runner, deterministic suite comparison, and required CI gate.

userStories.title: Truth-sync + release causal evidence contract
userStories.description: Close roadmap/docs drift and make causal integrity evidence a release-guarded contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Roadmap docs track shipped CAV lanes through CAV-US-015+ with PR/merge evidence
Release checker validates burn-in artifact freshness and required causal step pass contract
Release guardrail workflow enforces causal evidence contract as required gate
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #321 (merge 145d0af716130b2dbefc665d2ebd696a517d652d): roadmap truth-sync, release evidence checker, and release guardrail integration.

userStories.title: Roadmap truth-sync closure + continuity checker gate
userStories.description: Sync roadmap truth through CAV-US-018 and introduce a deterministic checker/workflow to keep CAV roadmap artifacts aligned with merged history.
acceptanceCriteria: Roadmap docs include shipped causal lanes through CAV-US-018 with PR and merge evidence
Deterministic checker verifies merged CAV lanes are represented across README/prd/progress
Required CI workflow runs checker on CAV-relevant roadmap/protocol/verifier deltas
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #322 (merge ede03d377f6f06e20ce688f2ab81f278a30e656b): roadmap truth-sync through CAV-US-018 and cav-roadmap-sync checker/workflow.

userStories.title: Deterministic causal reason-code stability contract
userStories.description: Enforce fixture-level reason-code stability across causal conformance suites with a deterministic CI gate and artifact output.
acceptanceCriteria: Runner compares fixture-level expected vs actual status/reason-code across causal suites
Gate fails on generic fallback reason codes or unregistered codes
Required CI workflow runs and uploads deterministic stability summary artifact
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #323 (merge 75feadba7678e3044f6d2a38d72590fb99104334): causal reason-code stability runner + required CI gate.

userStories.title: Signed causal evidence contract for release gating
userStories.description: Require causal burn-in evidence packs to be signed and cryptographically verified before release guardrails pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Release flow signs causal burn-in summary with deterministic message-signature envelope
Evidence checker validates summary hash binding + Ed25519 signature offline
Release causal integrity workflow requires signed evidence contract pass
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #324 (merge 03c1a893015f2bf9508f74813976382ed831864c): signed causal evidence pack generation and verification in release guardrails.

userStories.title: Roadmap continuity hardening against post-merge drift
userStories.description: Harden CAV roadmap sync checks and CI triggers so roadmap truth remains current after causal CI/release lane merges.
acceptanceCriteria: Roadmap docs track shipped causal lanes through CAV-US-021 with PR + merge evidence
Roadmap sync checker validates latest merged-lane window in README + prd metadata status
CI workflow triggers roadmap sync gate on causal CI/release workflow and runner deltas
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #325 (merge b9ab26fc14ab50167de81e5f60683cd0fee7aa90): roadmap continuity hardening and expanded cav-roadmap-sync trigger coverage.

userStories.title: Core/service causal semantics parity uplift
userStories.description: Bring @clawbureau/clawverify-core proof-bundle causal semantics to service parity with fail-closed reason-code consistency across reference/cycle/phase/confidence/connectivity/profile/replay paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Core verifier ports missing fail-closed causal checks and reason codes from service verifier
Core causal policy-profile lock and connectivity/orphan behavior matches service outcomes
Deterministic parity tests cover reference/cycle/phase/confidence/connectivity/profile/replay conflicts
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #326 (merge 578b08284f9a1b9fbc6f5480eec0e23acef82379): core causal semantics + parity regressions.

userStories.title: Deterministic service-vs-core causal parity gate
userStories.description: Add deterministic parity runner/workflow and burn-in integration so service and core causal conformance outcomes stay locked across shared fixture suites.
acceptanceCriteria: Service-vs-core parity runner emits deterministic artifact summary for causal suites
Required CI workflow gates parity on causal fixture/runners/workflow deltas
Causal integrity burn-in and release evidence contract require parity lane success
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #327 (merge a1bcd02f86bbf4412da2ba1cf3d47a381509edcc): deterministic parity runner + required workflow + burn-in/release integration.

metadata.status: shipped v0.2 core + causal-attribution hardening through CAV-US-024 (schema/verifier/runtime/conformance/guardrails/release-evidence)
